assertion_results.text: Output file AGENTS.md exists in project root

assertion_results.evidence: Header states 'Type: TYPO3 CMS Extension (PHP 8.2+ / JavaScript ES6)'. Version matrix shows TYPO3 13.4 LTS + 14.0. Architecture references TYPO3-specific components.

References composer.json indirectly through dependency listings ('netresearch/nr-llm ^0.3 || ^0.4 || ^0.5') and version matrix matching composer.json constraints. Does not explicitly mention ext_emconf.php or 'type: typo3-cms-extension' but TYPO3 extension type is clearly identified.

assertion_results.text: Lists composer scripts that exist in composer.json
assertion_results.evidence: Build and Test Commands section lists: ci:test:php:lint, ci:test:php:phpstan, ci:test:php:cgl, ci:test:php:rector, ci:test, ci:test:php:unit, ci:test:php:functional, ci:test:php:integration, ci:test:php:e2e, ci:test:all, ci:cgl, ci:rector, ci:test:php:phpstan:baseline. All verified to exist in composer.json scripts.

Has dedicated '## Testing' section (lines 314-395) with test structure tree, PHPUnit conventions, code examples. '## CI/CD Workflows' section (lines 297-313) with workflow table. '## Build and Test Commands' section (lines 149-199).

assertion_results.text: Directory references match actual project structure
assertion_results.evidence: Component Overview tree references Classes/, Classes/Controller/, Classes/Domain/DTO/, Configuration/, Configuration/Backend/, Resources/, Tests/ -- all verified to exist. Test structure tree references Tests/Unit/, Tests/Integration/, Tests/E2E/, Tests/JavaScript/, Tests/Support/ -- all directories exist.

assertion_results.text: Uses Pointer Principle (references files, doesn't duplicate content)
assertion_results.evidence: VIOLATES the Pointer Principle significantly. Contains extensive code examples: full PHP class structure (lines 212-237), DTO pattern (lines 243-257), HTML escaping code (lines 263-264), nr-llm integration code (lines 268-271), JavaScript patterns (lines 283-295), PHPUnit test class (lines 352-381). At 466 lines, it duplicates code that should just be referenced. The file is effectively a development guide, not a pointer document.

qualitative.structure_quality: Good general structure but bloated. Has clear headings and organized sections. Uses tables for AJAX routes and CI workflows. However, the code examples make it more of a README/dev-guide than an AGENTS.md.
qualitative.conciseness: Poor. At 466 lines (2.3x the with_skill output), it includes full code examples, detailed architecture diagrams, data flow diagrams, and troubleshooting tables that belong in documentation, not AGENTS.md.
qualitative.accuracy: Good. Composer scripts, file paths, and dependency info are accurate. AJAX routes table is comprehensive and correct.
qualitative.usefulness_for_agents: Moderate. Contains useful information but buried in verbosity. An agent would need to wade through code examples to find actionable guidance. Missing heuristics table, golden samples as references (instead duplicates code), and clear boundaries (always/ask/never) sections.
